history.subject: D5: finitely generated graded module over MvPolynomial(Fin r) κ (degree-one polyModule action) has finite-dimensional graded pieces — monomial/homogeneous degree-shift from RaisesDegree, then the degree-n projection of p·h lands in the finite-dimensional image of restrictTotalDegree n under ·•h; discharges the [∀ n, FiniteDimensional κ (ℳ n)] hypothesis of the Hilbert-series induction

Adelic chi-ledger start (N13 core): the coboundary subgroup B(D) = Gamma(U0,O(D)) + Gamma(U1,O(D)) inside the function field, the twist-ledger Submodule exactness at the L-terms for D <= D', and the local-step quotient scaffolding — the elementary lattice algebra of Weil's chi additivity over the 2-chart cover. (One noncomputable annotation added post-wave to pass kernel check.)

Register the wave-6 modules: FiniteMapToP1 (nonconstant curve morphisms to separated finite-type targets are finite; HasFiniteMapToP1 reduced to the bare ExistsNonconstantMapToP1 gate), P1ChartData (coordinate sections + monomial span core), ChiLedger (N13 twist-ledger core), InvertibleGrBridge (IsLocallyTrivial => IsInvertibleGr, unlocking the commutative section graded ring for line bundles), GradedPiecesFinite (f.g. graded modules over MvPolynomial have finite-dimensional pieces, Serre D5).

Picard/SchematicSupport: descent-iso affine heart — for I ≤ Ann_R M the closed-immersion unit m ↦ 1⊗ₜm : M → (R⧸I)⊗_R M is bijective (M ≃ₗ (R⧸I)⊗M), the sections-level iso step of F ≅ i_*i^*F needing only annihilator_ideal_le, not the blocked sharpness reverse

Reduce nonconstant-map gate to base-change-free Proj-model gate: ExistsNonconstantMapToP1 C follows from a nonconstant morphism C ⟶ Proj ℤ[X₀,X₁] via pullback.lift over the terminal object (ℙ¹_k = Spec k ×_⊤ Proj), discharging the over-k/base-change bookkeeping and isolating the residual curve theory in ExistsNonconstantMapToProjInt

RR χ-ledger N14: local step dimension ≤ residue degree via k-linear injection into the single-point valuation quotient (κ(P)-target); field-of-constants gate, k-submodule sections, DVR order↔stalk-integrality bridge

Substantive Abel map Div_{C/k} → Pic^♯_{C/k}, [D] ↦ [O(D)] = −[ker q]: repin HasAbelMap to a data-carrying class carrying abelKernelNatTrans ≫ picNeg; kernel–base-change naturality via the invertible pullback–kernel comparison
P1 chart-ring span core: (𝒜 0)-span of coordinate powers X₁/X₀ exhausts the degree-zero away ring (ℤ[X₀,X₁]_{X₀})₀ (route step 1)

RR χ-ledger N15/N16: k-dimension ledger (coboundary/H¹ as k-vector spaces, χ:=ℓ-h¹), 4-term exact-sequence alternating dimension identity, χ-additivity χ(D')=χ(D)+dim(𝒜(D')/𝒜(D)) gated on the ledger exact sequence, and Riemann inequality deg D + χ(0) ≤ ℓ(D) via i(D)≥0

N5 cocycle layer: product-typed Cech differentials d01/d12 with componentwise coface formulas, restriction calculus (trans/self/injective/iso) for the opens poset, and the overlap 1-cocycle q ↦ (0,q,−q,0) with its 8-index cocycle proof (kernel membership in d¹)
